General.Name: ProPetro Holding Corp
General.Description: ProPetro Holding Corp. operates as an integrated energy services company. It offers hydraulic fracturing, wireline and cementing, other complementary energy completion services, and power generation services to oil and gas producers and non-oil and gas applications, such as general industrial projects and data centers located primarily in Texas and New Mexico. ProPetro Holding Corp. was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Midland, Texas.
General.Address: One Marienfeld Place, Midland, TX, United States, 79701
